analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e Fighter class progression. The feature description accurately reflects the mechanics of Extra Attack at levels 5, 11, and 20.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, direct, and provides all necessary numerical triggers (levels) for feature progression.

mechanics.trigger: Taking the Attack action on your turn.

level_progression.effect: Attack three times, instead of once.
Attack four times, instead of once.

mechanics.clarification: This feature modifies the Attack action, allowing multiple attacks within that single action economy. It correctly stacks with the base number of attacks granted by the action.
